text: Rebecca - do you want 'You Say' as the opener or after the first break? I can pull either version from the archive.
Let's open with it. Sets the tone before I even say a word. Thank you, TJ.
Rebecca, the $180 supply budget looks fine to me. Submit through the standard pastoral care requisition by January 30 and I will sign off.
Mid-year check-in scheduled for both residents - January 22 at 2 PM. Focus areas: documentation, self-care, and theological reflection.
Completed module 4 today. Running total now at 28 hours. Need 22 more before Dec 31.
Good show Saturday. Phones were busy - a lot of listener response to the Honoring the Fathers of Faith message. Want to schedule a follow-up listener call-in episode?
Yes - pencil in February 7 for a listener call-in on healing family relationships. I will draft the run-of-show this week.
Please have your section of the protocol review submitted by January 27. We present to administration February 3.
